stemHtml: What is the advantage of balanced V1, even in the event of a climb limited take-off?

options.a: The climb limited take-off mass is the highest.
options.b: The accelerate stop distance required is the shortest.
options.c: The safety margin with respect to the runway length is greatest.
options.d: The take-off distance required with one engine out at V<sub>1</sub> is the shortest.
